titleStmt.title: SII 9.409: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 409. (A.R. No. 376 of 1927.) ON A SLAB SET UP BY THE SIDE OF THE EAST VERANDAH OF THE PRAKARA OF THE KOTESVARA TEMPLE AT KOTESVARA, A SUBURB OF COONDAPUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1287, Viśvāvasu, Āśvayuja, ba. 2, Gu[ruvāra], corresponding to A.D. 1365 October 2 Thursday, in the reign of the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Vīra-Bukkaṇṇa-Oḍeya. It records that, under the orders of the king, Dharaṇidēva, son of Muddeya-Nāgappa, purchased four plots of land, yielding 124 mūḍes of paddy and 18 honnus, in Kōṭēśvara and made a gift of it for feeding every day six Brāhmans including a cook in the Kōṭīśvara temple. Malleya-Daṇṇāyaka who was ruling the Bārakūrarājya under the orders of the king, made the plots of land free from taxes.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . namastuṁgaśiraṁścuṁbicandracāmaracāravē trailōkyana
garāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śakavarṣa 1287 neya vi
śvāvasusaṁvatsarada Āśvayuja ba 2 gu daṁdu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ śrīvī
rabukkaṁṇaOḍeyara nirūpadiṁ malleyadaṁṇāyakaru bārakūra rājyavanāḷuva kāla
dalli śrīmatu muddeya nāgappanavara makkaḷu dharaṇidēvaṁgaḷu kōṭīśvaradēvaralu Ayivaru
brā(ṁ)hmaru Aḍigeya māḍuvavanobba A(ṁ)ntu Āṟu praje brā(ṁ)hmara bhōjanake Ā
caṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi naḍasuvaṁtāge koṁḍa bhōga mūlaśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare Ā
dharaṇidēvaṁgaḷu dhaniyara kayyalu dhārāpūrvvakavāgi koṁḍa bāḷina viva
ra baḍagada kereya Adhivāsadalu kārabayala bāḷina catusīme Ūra vōṇiyiṁ paḍuvalu
jōḷiyara gaḍiya bēliyimdaṁ baḍagalu harida hoḷeyiṁdaṁ mū
ḍalu Ūra vōṇiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu A(ṁ)ntu catusīmeya voḷage bittuva bāḷu
nāgaṁḍugada mūḍe 14 Alliya maneya ṭhāu sahitavāgi Ā bāḷiṁda
varuṣa 1 kaṁ baha gēṇa bhatta nāgaṁḍugada mūḍe 32 kuṁdāpurada haṁgara
Adhivāsadalu kaṁtāḍiya biṁnāṇiya kayyalū haṁgarabaṭṭana kayyalū dani
yaru mūlavāgi koṁḍa bāḷina vivara catussīme sahasraṁṇakaḷa vōṇiyiṁ
daṁ paḍavalu sahasraṁṇakkaḷa vōṇiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu hatyārayyara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ
mūḍalu sahasraṁṇakkaḷa bāḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīmeyo
ḷaguḷḷa maneya ṭhāvu mūḍalu beḷada bāḷu nāgaṁḍugada mūḍe 12 bāvi keṟe
beḷeya makki sahitavāgi Ā bāḷiṁda varṣa 1 kaṁ baha gēṇi bhatta nāgaṁḍuga
da mūḍe 12 Ānegaḷiya kaḷiṁjayalu garuḍage vōṇiyiṁda va
ruṣa 1 kaṁ baha bārakūra ga 12 dēvara Āgarada kaṟukeya teṁkakaḍeya
hosamaṁṭapada Uppināgarada gēṇiyiṁ varuṣa 1 kaṁ baha rokka ga 6 yiṁ
tīpayika nālkaṟa bāḷu mane Uppunāgarakeṟe bāvi maṁṭa ra nekki
ḍilu beṭṭu sahitavāgi baha bhatta nāgaṁḍugada mūḍe nūṟai
ppattunālku rokka hadineṇṭu ho(ṁ)nnu Aṁtu yī payika nālkaṟa mēle
baha teṟanū daniyaru tamma baddhabhōjana naḍavaṁtāgi yikki koṁ
ḍu Ā bāḷugaḷa mēle Uḷa pūrvvāya Akara A(ṁ)nyāyavanū kādu sarvva
bādhe parihāravāgi dharaṇidēvaṁgaḷa kayyalu Ā daniyaru Ardha
paricchēdavāgi koṁḍu mūlaparichyēdhavā
yalu dhārāpūrvvakavāgi
Digital edition of SII 9.409 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
